title: Иван Васильевич меняет профессию - Звенит январская вьюга
text:
Travis - Re-Offender

Intro:

b |--------3----3-----------------------------------------------------------|
g |--1/4--4--4----4-----4--------1/4--4--4--2--4--2-------------------------|

a |-------------------------------------------------------------------------|

Verse:
Bm                   A
Keeping up appearances
G                       Em
Keeping up with the Jones'
Bm                    A
Fooling my selfish heart
G                       Em 
Going through the motions
Em                A
But I'm fooling myself
    Em          A
I'm fooling myself

Chorus:
          Bm            G
Cause you say you love me
                    Em               G
And then you do it again, you do it again
    Bm           G
You say your sorry's
                    Em               G
And then you do it again, you do it again

Verse:
Bm                         A
Everybody thinks you're well
G                      Em
Everybody thinks I'm ill
Bm                  A
Watching me fall apart
G                     Em
Falling under your spell
           Em           A
But you're fooling yourself
       Em           A
You're fooling yourself

Chorus:
          Bm            G
Cause you say you love me
                    Em               G
And then you do it again, you do it again
    Bm           G
You say your sorry's
                    Em               G
And then you do it again, you do it again
And again and again and again and again

Solo: play riff 1 twice then riff 2 once and back to riff 1 once
